sources.label: Assignment Generator
sources.description: Reviews draft assignments and generated run IDs before publishing.

sources.label: Daily Board
sources.description: Checks coverage spots, open slots, and shift windows.

sources.label: Leave Banks / Requests
sources.description: Flags employees assigned while approved or pending leave affects coverage.

sources.label: Training & Certifications
sources.description: Flags training conflicts and missing/expired qualifications.

sources.label: Mandation / Rest Rules
sources.description: Previews rest, consecutive hour, and forced OT rule violations.

conflicts.message: Employee appears assigned to Dispatch D1 and Training Block T2 during overlapping hours.
Coverage is below minimum by one dispatcher after leave impact is applied.
conflicts.recommendedAction: Offer OT, approve volunteer, or review mandation options.

conflicts.message: Employee is assigned to a spot requiring Police Radio qualification not currently shown as active.
conflicts.recommendedAction: Confirm qualification or select eligible employee.

conflicts.message: Draft assignment may violate configured minimum rest period after prior shift.
conflicts.recommendedAction: Supervisor may override with reason if agency policy allows.

conflicts.message: Employee has pending approved leave impact during part of this shift.
conflicts.recommendedAction: Convert to open spot or adjust leave request coverage impact.

conflicts.message: Draft board exceeds configured maximum staffing for the role/time block.
conflicts.recommendedAction: Confirm training/overlap reason or remove extra coverage.

conflicts.message: Manual override exists and should be preserved when publishing generated assignments.
conflicts.recommendedAction: No action unless override is no longer needed.

ruleChecks.rule: No double assignment within overlapping time windows
Minimum staffing by role and time block
Approved leave removes employee from coverage
Manual overrides remain visible and audited

resolutionQueue.item: Resolve critical double assignment before publish.
Fill under-minimum Dispatcher D3 on night shift.
Review missing qualification warning for James Hall.
Confirm rest-rule override path for April Stone.

rules: Conflict Detection is read-only in v2.28.0.
No draft assignment is auto-published from this page.
Hard-rule conflicts should block future publish workflows unless an admin-defined override allows it.
Soft-rule conflicts should require supervisor acknowledgement and an audit reason.
Role-based panels continue to replace duplicate -admin pages unless a workflow is truly separate.
